metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the nutrition domain.

children.name: Ingredient & Nutrient Data Model
children.description: Ingredients, nutrients, digestibility/energy systems, UoM conversions, derived values, metadata.

internalModules.title: Canonical Data Model
internalModules.description: Defines the core entities, relationships, and schemas managed by Ingredient & Nutrient Data Model.

internalModules.title: Quality and Governance Controls
internalModules.description: Validates, governs, and curates the information maintained by Ingredient & Nutrient Data Model.

internalModules.title: Distribution and Access Services
internalModules.description: Serves trusted data products and downstream access patterns from Ingredient & Nutrient Data Model.

interfaces.title: Data Access API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving or maintaining the canonical data exposed by Ingredient & Nutrient Data Model.

interfaces.title: Data Stewardship Console
interfaces.description: User interface for governing, curating, and reviewing information in Ingredient & Nutrient Data Model.

interfaces.title: Data Distribution Feed
interfaces.description: Event or export interface for distributing changes originating in Ingredient & Nutrient Data Model.

children.name: Constraints, Rules & Business Logic
children.description: Min/max bounds, ratios, additive rules, ingredient bans, customer constraints, plant constraints.

internalModules.title: Rules and Configuration Model
internalModules.description: Defines the configurable policies, thresholds, and business rules for Constraints, Rules & Business Logic.

internalModules.title: Decision Evaluation Engine
internalModules.description: Executes policy and pricing decisions in real time within Constraints, Rules & Business Logic.

internalModules.title: Simulation and Override Controls
internalModules.description: Supports testing, exceptions, and operator overrides for Constraints, Rules & Business Logic.

interfaces.title: Decision API
interfaces.description: API that returns policy, quote, or eligibility outcomes calculated by Constraints, Rules & Business Logic.

interfaces.title: Configuration Workspace
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing rules, policies, and overrides in Constraints, Rules & Business Logic.

interfaces.title: Policy Change Events
interfaces.description: Event stream that communicates policy updates and decision outcomes from Constraints, Rules & Business Logic.

children.name: Least-Cost Optimization Solver
children.description: Optimization engine with objectives (cost, margin, sustainability), multiple constraints, penalties.

internalModules.title: Constraint and Objective Model
internalModules.description: Represents the optimization constraints, targets, and trade-offs used by Least-Cost Optimization Solver.

internalModules.title: Solver Execution Engine
internalModules.description: Runs optimization or scenario computations performed by Least-Cost Optimization Solver.

internalModules.title: Scenario Review Workspace
internalModules.description: Supports comparison, tuning, and review of outcomes generated by Least-Cost Optimization Solver.

interfaces.title: Optimization API
interfaces.description: API for submitting optimization jobs or retrieving scenario results from Least-Cost Optimization Solver.

interfaces.title: Planning Workspace
interfaces.description: Interactive interface for configuring and reviewing plans generated by Least-Cost Optimization Solver.

interfaces.title: Scenario Result Events
interfaces.description: Event stream used to publish scenario completion and outcome changes from Least-Cost Optimization Solver.

children.name: Recipe Lifecycle & Governance
children.description: Versioning, approvals, effective dates, audit trail, change rationale, role-based permissions.

internalModules.title: Core Domain Engine
internalModules.description: Implements the main business logic and lifecycle handled by Recipe Lifecycle & Governance.

interfaces.title: Domain Event Feed

interfaces.description: API used by pipelines and tooling to interact with the platform services behind CI/CD & Release Management.

interfaces.title: Platform Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event interface exposing platform lifecycle and automation signals from CI/CD & Release Management.

children.name: Observability (Logs/Metrics/Tracing)
children.description: Centralized monitoring, alerting, SLOs, performance monitoring and root-cause tooling.

internalModules.title: Signal Ingestion and Processing
internalModules.description: Collects operational and business signals that feed Observability (Logs/Metrics/Tracing).

internalModules.title: Metrics and Decision Engine
internalModules.description: Calculates insights, KPIs, forecasts, or scores produced by Observability (Logs/Metrics/Tracing).

internalModules.title: Reporting and Operations Workspace
internalModules.description: Presents actionable views, alerts, and drill-down workflows for Observability (Logs/Metrics/Tracing).

interfaces.title: Dashboard Interface
interfaces.description: Interactive reporting or control surface that presents insights from Observability (Logs/Metrics/Tracing).

interfaces.title: Metrics and Query API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving metrics, scores, forecasts, or analytical outputs from Observability (Logs/Metrics/Tracing).

interfaces.title: Alert and Signal Feed
interfaces.description: Event or notification interface exposing operational signals generated by Observability (Logs/Metrics/Tracing).

children.name: Backup, Disaster Recovery & HA
children.description: Backups, restore testing, RPO/RTO targets, high availability patterns.

internalModules.title: Experience Shell and Navigation
internalModules.description: Provides the primary user flow, navigation, and page composition for Backup, Disaster Recovery & HA.

internalModules.title: Session and Personalization State
internalModules.description: Manages user context, preferences, and personalized behavior within Backup, Disaster Recovery & HA.

internalModules.title: Content and Interaction Orchestration
internalModules.description: Coordinates the content blocks, tasks, and interaction logic shown by Backup, Disaster Recovery & HA.

interfaces.title: User Experience Interface
interfaces.description: Primary user-facing interface delivered by Backup, Disaster Recovery & HA.

interfaces.title: Experience Backend API
interfaces.description: API surface used to assemble state and content for Backup, Disaster Recovery & HA.

interfaces.title: Interaction Event Stream
interfaces.description: Event interface capturing user actions and journey signals from Backup, Disaster Recovery & HA.

children.name: Data Platform Foundations
children.description: Operational data stores, analytics warehouse/lake hooks, retention and data pipelines.

internalModules.title: Canonical Data Model
internalModules.description: Defines the core entities, relationships, and schemas managed by Data Platform Foundations.

internalModules.title: Quality and Governance Controls
internalModules.description: Validates, governs, and curates the information maintained by Data Platform Foundations.

internalModules.title: Distribution and Access Services
internalModules.description: Serves trusted data products and downstream access patterns from Data Platform Foundations.

interfaces.title: Data Access API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving or maintaining the canonical data exposed by Data Platform Foundations.

interfaces.title: Data Stewardship Console
interfaces.description: User interface for governing, curating, and reviewing information in Data Platform Foundations.

interfaces.title: Data Distribution Feed
interfaces.description: Event or export interface for distributing changes originating in Data Platform Foundations.
